item.title: 🚨 BJP vs TMC | Mamata Banerjee Hospital Drama Exposed | ATT@CK ON ABHISHEK BANERJEE | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨 BJP vs TMC | Mamata Banerjee Hospital Drama Exposed | ATT@CK ON ABHISHEK BANERJEE | | VR Raja
కలకత్తా వీధుల్లో మమతా బెనర్జీ మేనల్లుడు అభిషేక్ బెనర్జీ (Abhishek Banerjee) పై జరిగిన ఘోరమైన రాళ్ల దాడి వెనుక ఉన్న అసలు కుట్ర ఏంటి? ఇది బీజేపీ ప్లాన్ చేశారా లేక టీఎంసీ (TMC) అంతర్గత వర్గపోరుకి నిదర్శనమా?
For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com
Ee video lo, West Bengal politics ni shake chestunna recent attacks and high-drama events gurinchi detailed ga discuss cheddam. 1990 lo Mamata Banerjee ki thagilina debba aameni CM ni chesindi, mari ippudu 2026 lo Abhishek Banerjee ki helmet pranalu kapadina incident TMC ki kalisi ostunda leka poorthiga mumpu ki daritheesthunda?
In this deep dive into the bloody politics and massive financial crisis of West Bengal, we cover: 🔸 The Attack Breakdown: A minute-by-minute account of how CID summons led Abhishek Banerjee to a hostile mob in Sonarpur, facing black flags, broomsticks, and a brutal stone-pelting attack. 🔸 The Hospital Drama: The controversy at Belle Vue hospital where doctors declared Abhishek had no serious injuries, leading to viral audio clips of Mamata Banerjee threatening the hospital CEO. 🔸 The Shocking Twist: How BJP IT Cell Chief Amit Malviya exposed that the attackers were not BJP workers, but close associates of former TMC MLA Lovely Maitra, revealing deep internal factionalism. 🔸 The TMC Collapse: Analyzing the mass resignation of 9 TMC councillors in Diamond Harbour, the boycott of Mamata's emergency meeting by 60 MLAs, and the public vandalism of relief funds hidden in a TMC MP's office. 🔸 Suvendu Adhikari's New Era: The fast-track decisions of the new BJP Chief Minister, from canceling religion-based schemes to executing border fencing in 45 days. 🔸 The Rs 85,000 Crore Danger: Why the newly launched "Annapurna Yojana" (replacing Lakshmi Bhandar) could push West Bengal's already debt-ridden economy into a catastrophic fiscal crisis.
Asalu ee internal politics and economic burden valla Bengal future em avvabotundi anukuntunnaru? Mee opinion kinda comment cheyandi!

item.title: Spider-Noir
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Spider-Noir.

Spider-Noir tells the story of Ben Reilly, a seasoned, down on his luck private investigator in 1930s New York, who is forced to grapple with his past life, following a deeply personal tragedy, as the city's one and only superhero.

item.title: Ponies
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ponies.

Moscow, 1977. Two "PONIES" ("persons of no interest" in intelligence speak) work anonymously as secretaries in the American Embassy. That is until their husbands are killed under mysterious circumstances in the USSR, and the pair become CIA operatives. Bea is an over educated, Russian speaking child of Soviet immigrants. Her cohort, Twila, is a small town girl who is as abrasive as she is fearless. Together, they work to uncover a vast Cold War conspiracy and solve the mystery that made them widows in the first place.

item.description:
🚨 INDIA'S MASTER PLAN AMIT SHAH WARNING | Smart Border & Nationwide Illegal Deportation | VR Raja
Description పాకిస్తాన్ మరియు బంగ్లాదేశ్ బోర్డర్స్ ని పూర్తిగా సీల్ చేయడానికి ఇండియా (India) చేపడుతున్న "స్మార్ట్ బోర్డర్" ప్రాజెక్ట్ ఏంటి? ఫేక్ ఐడిలతో వేల కోట్లు దోచేస్తున్న ఇల్లీగల్స్ ని ఇండియన్ గవర్నమెంట్ ఎలా దేశం దాటిస్తోంది? For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com Ee video lo, recent ga Indian Government border security kosam tesukunna massive and shocking decisions gurinchi detailed ga discuss cheddam. Pakistan border daggara illegal structures ni enduku demolish chestunnaru? AI cameras, drones, and fiber optics tho 6000 km "Smart Border" ni ela tayaru chestunnaru? In this deep dive into India's ultimate national security and border management strategies, we cover: 🔸 The Bikaner Review Meeting: Amit Shah's order to demolish all illegal structures within 15 km of the Pakistan border to destroy smuggling and terror logistics hubs. 🔸 Financial & Terror Networks: How terrorists use fake documentation to create mule accounts, and the urgent order for District Magistrates to verify border-area businesses. 🔸 The Smart Border Project: A detailed breakdown of the high-tech electric wall covering 6000 km, featuring AI-enabled surveillance, UAVs, ground sensors, and real-time command centers. 🔸 The Bengal Crackdown: The impact of Suvendu Adhikari's "Detect, Delete, Deport" movement in West Bengal and how the cancellation of the Lakshmir Bhandar scheme exposed millions of illegal beneficiaries. 🔸 Nationwide Deportation: How the IAF (Indian Air Force) is being used to transport detained illegal immigrants from states like Delhi, Gujarat, and Maharashtra back to the Bangladesh border. 🔸 The Trigger Factors: Why the Pahalgam terror attack and the shifting political landscape in Bangladesh (China's influence) forced India to take these aggressive steps now. item.title: TV Review: ‘The Boroughs’
item.description: Arriving on Netflix on May 21st with all eight episodes, ‘The Boroughs’ is set in a seemingly ideal elder community where something decidedly nasty is lurking in the walls.[sc name="tvshow" tvshow_id="Lw08WSnJvzf17JlU53MrN2" ]With ‘Stranger Things’ creators Matt and Ross Duffer as executive producers, the new show (created by Jeffrey Addiss and Will Matthews) features a cast including Alfred Molina (‘Spider-Man: No Way Home’), Geena Davis (‘Thelma & Louise’), Clarke Peters (‘The Wire’) and Denis O’Hare (‘Dallas Buyers Club').

item.title: 🚨TRUMP TWIST TO PAKISTAN | How America Trapped Pakistan in the Middle East War | VR Raja Explains
item.description:
🚨TRUMP TWIST TO PAKISTAN | How America Trapped Pakistan in the Middle East War | VR Raja Explains
అమెరికా ప్రెసిడెంట్ ట్రంప్ పాకిస్తాన్ కి ఇచ్చిన ఆ సీక్రెట్ వార్నింగ్ ఏంటి? ఇరాన్ యుద్ధం ఆపాలంటే ముస్లిం దేశాలు ఇజ్రాయెల్ ని యాక్సెప్ట్ చేయాలా? పెట్రోల్ రేట్లు మళ్లీ పెరుగుతాయా? For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations: 📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.com Ee video lo, present geopolitics ni shake chestunna US President Donald Trump gari conference call gurinchi detailed ga discuss cheddam. Iran war aapalante 'Abraham Accords' meeda sign cheyali ani Trump pettina condition valla Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, and UAE enduku shock ayyayi? In this deep dive into the Middle East crisis and its global impact, we cover: 🔸 The Midnight Hammer: Analyzing the joint US and Israel airstrikes on Iran's nuclear facilities (Fordo, Natanz, Isfahan) and the destruction of the Bandar Abbas naval base. 🔸 The Trump Ultimatum: The shocking details of the May 23rd conference call where Trump demanded that Middle Eastern leaders, including Pakistan's Asim Munir, officially recognize Israel. 🔸 What are Abraham Accords? Breaking down the historic 2020 agreement where countries like UAE and Bahrain normalized relations with Israel, completely bypassing the Palestine issue. 🔸 Pakistan's Dilemma: Why recognizing Israel is a "political suicide" for Pakistan, risking massive nationwide riots by groups like Jamaat-e-Islami and supporters of Imran Khan. 🔸 The Economic Threat: If Pakistan rejects the deal, how the US can crush its economy by blocking IMF bailouts and using the FATF grey list. 🔸 Impact on India: The reality of soaring Brent crude oil prices ($115-$120), the competition with China for Russian oil, and why Indians should prepare for inflation and rising petrol prices. Asalu Pakistan ee Abraham accords ki oppukuntunda leka US aid vadulukuntunda? Mee opinion kinda comment cheyandi!
#VRRaja #GeopoliticsTelugu #MiddleEastCrisis #TrumpNews #IranWar #PakistanCrisis #AbrahamAccords #IndianEconomy

item.description:
🚨INDIA IN BIG TROUBLE | How China Helped Pakistan Against the Indian Military | VR Raja
పెహల్గామ్ ఎటాక్ వెనుక ఉన్న చైనా (China) హస్తం ఏంటి? నేపాల్ మరియు బంగ్లాదేశ్ లు ఇండియాకి ఎందుకు ఎదురు తిరుగుతున్నాయి? చైనా వేస్తున్న "స్ట్రింగ్ ఆఫ్ పెర్ల్స్" ఉచ్చు నుండి ఇండియా ఎలా తప్పించుకోబోతోంది? In this deep dive into the hidden wars and border tensions surrounding India, we cover: 🔸 The Pahalgam Attack Evidence: How the NIA uncovered a US-made GoPro camera shipped from China to LeT terrorists, along with Chinese-origin AK-47s and encrypted communication tools. 🔸 Operation Sindoor Secrets: The shocking revelation from Chinese CCTV that AVIC engineers were present in Pakistan, guiding them using the Beidou navigation system and realigning satellites against India. 🔸 Bangladesh Border Clashes: The recent standoff between the Indian BSF and Bangladesh BGB over border fencing, and the alarming China-backed drone manufacturing factory being built near the Indian border. 🔸 Nepal's Shift to China: Why the new Balen Shah government in Nepal is promoting a "Greater Nepal" map, rejecting the Kailash Mansarovar Yatra route, and leaning heavily towards Chinese infrastructure loans. 🔸 The Dalai Lama Warning: China's strict warning to India regarding the reincarnation of the 90-year-old Dalai Lama and the fight for control over Tibetan Buddhism. 🔸 String of Pearls vs Necklace of Diamonds: A massive breakdown of China's strategy to encircle India with ports and military bases, and how India is countering it through QUAD, Act East Policy, and naval dominance. In this deep dive into one of ancient India's greatest mysteries, we cover: 🔸 The Golden City: The strategic construction of Dwarka by Lord Krishna and its highly advanced urban planning and security systems. 🔸 Archaeological Evidence: Discoveries by Dr. S.R. Rao, including massive stone anchors, fortified walls, and ancient artifacts found underwater. 🔸 The Tragic Fall: The mythological history, curses, and the dramatic end of the Yadava dynasty. 🔸 The Mega Tsunami: Geological and oceanographic proofs of a catastrophic 15-meter sea-level rise that submerged the great city. 🔸 The Timeline Debate: The ultimate clash between Carbon dating (1500 BCE) and Astronomical evidence (5525 BCE), alongside the shocking Gulf of Cambay discoveries. 🔸 Modern Explorations: How the ASI's underwater wing is using advanced sonar, Thermoluminescence, and DNA analysis to map the ancient ruins. item.title: 🚨 EBOLA V*RUS OUT BREAK Explained | GLOBAL EMERGENCY DECLARED | IS INDIA SAFE | VR Raja
item.description:
🚨 EBOLA V*RUS OUT BREAK Explained | GLOBAL EMERGENCY DECLARED | IS INDIA SAFE | VR Raja
కరోనా మర్చిపోకముందే ప్రపంచాన్ని వణికిస్తున్న మరో మహమ్మారి ఎబోలా! దీనికి ఎందుకు మందు లేదు? ఇది ఇండియాకి వస్తుందా? డీటెయిల్డ్ ఫాక్ట్స్!For Business Inquiries & Brand Collaborations:📧 vrfactsofficial1969@gmail.comEe video lo, Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) mariyu Uganda lo start ayina kotha Ebola outbreak gurinchi matladukundam. World Health Organization (WHO) enduku deenni 'Public Health Emergency of International Concern' (PHEIC) ga declare chesindi? Asalu ee Bundibugyo virus ki vaccine enduku ledu?In this deep dive into the 17th Ebola outbreak and its devastating consequences, we cover:🔸 The Tragic Origin: How a health worker's death in Bunia and initial false-negative tests led to the silent spread of the deadly Bundibugyo virus.🔸 The Six Ebola Variants: Understanding the different strains of Ebola, including Zaire and Sudan, and why the current Bundibugyo strain is so resistant to existing vaccines.🔸 How it Spreads: Demystifying the "Spillover" effect from fruit bats to humans and the harsh reality of transmission through bodily fluids, unlike the airborne COVID-19.🔸 The Terrifying Symptoms: Separating Hollywood myths from reality—why internal bleeding, diarrhea, and organ failure make this virus incredibly fatal.🔸 The Dangerous Delay: Why the 3-week delay in identifying the specific strain caused the virus to spread rapidly into urban centers like Kampala and reach the third-largest outbreak in history.🔸 The Ground Reality: How armed conflicts, rebel groups like M23, and community mistrust regarding cultural funerals are making it impossible to contain the virus.🔸 Risk to India: Analyzing the global threat level and the critical precautions international travelers must take upon returning to India.Asalu ee virus ki thvaraga vaccine vastundhi anukuntunnara? Ee video lo, India ni vanikistunna extreme heatwaves mariyu daani venuka unna scientific reasons gurinchi detailed ga discuss cheddam. AQI release chesina latest list lo top 100 hottest cities lo 97 Indian cities eh enduku unnayi? Asalu El Niño antentii? Nighttime heat enduku intha dangerous ga marutundi?
In this deep dive into the current climate crisis and its impact on our daily lives, we cover: 🔸 The Shocking Numbers: Analyzing the AQI report where Indian cities dominated the global heat rankings, with temperatures reaching 48°C in places like Sasaram, Bihar. 🔸 What is a Heatwave? Breaking down the IMD's definition of a heatwave and why 37°C in a coastal area like Vizag is as dangerous as 47°C in Rajasthan. 🔸 The Science of El Niño: Explaining how shifting wind patterns in the Pacific Ocean push warm, moist air away from India, causing delayed monsoons and severe dry heat. 🔸 The Hidden Danger (Warm Nights): Why the increase in nighttime temperatures and the "Urban Heat Island" effect prevent the human body from recovering, leading to severe health risks. 🔸 Economic & Job Losses: The devastating impact of heat exposure on street vendors, gig workers, and farmers, leading to massive agricultural and economic losses. 🔸 Telugu States at Risk: Why Andhra Pradesh ranks as the number one heat risk state in India according to CEEW data, and the precautions being taken. 🔸 Safety First: Essential guidelines to stay hydrated, recognize heat stroke symptoms, and show humanity to delivery workers during these extreme temperatures.

Ee video lo, US Dollar tho poliste Indian Rupee value sudden ga ₹96 ki enduku padipoindi ane vishayam meeda detailed ga analyse cheddam. 2026 lo Asia's worst-performing currency ga Indian Rupee enduku nilichindi? Pakistan and Bangladesh currency la kante manadi enduku weak avthundi?
In this deep dive into global economics and India's currency crisis, we cover:
🔸 Supply and Demand Basics: A simple explanation of how currency valuation works and why the demand for dollars is skyrocketing in India. 🔸 The Middle East War Impact: How the disruption in the Strait of Hormuz and the 50% surge in Brent crude oil prices forced India to spend double the dollars on imports. 🔸 FPI Outflows: The staggering withdrawal of over $40 Billion by Foreign Portfolio Investors from Indian equities and its devastating effect on the Rupee. 🔸 The Current Account Deficit: Understanding India's structural problems with oil, gold, and electronics imports overshadowing IT exports. 🔸 The AI Failure: How missing out on the global AI and semiconductor capital rotation made India vulnerable compared to China and Taiwan. 🔸 The 100 Rupee Fear: Analyzing expert opinions from Arvind Panagariya and Gita Gopinath on whether a ₹100/Dollar exchange rate is just a psychological number or a real economic disaster. 🔸 What You Must Do: Practical steps like reducing gold purchases, controlling fuel consumption, and opting for local goods to save our economy.Asalu Rupee 100 hit avtunda leda? Ee crisis meeda mee opinion ento kinda comment cheyandi!
#VRRaja #IndianRupee #DollarVsRupee #IndianEconomy #RupeeFall #CurrentAffairsTelugu #economiccrisis

item.title: Best Medicine
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Best Medicine.

In Best Medicine a brilliant surgeon leaves Boston to become a small-town doctor where he spent childhood summers. Despite his medical skills, his rude manner alienates locals as he battles hidden phobias and struggles with personal connections.

item.title: Widow's Bay
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Widow's Bay.

Widow's Bay is about a mysteriously cursed New England island and its superstitious citizens, led by a mayor who refuses to believe their warnings.

item.title: Margo's Got Money Troubles
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Margo's Got Money Troubles.

Margo Millet is the daughter of a Hooters waitress and an ex-pro wrestler. Now an unemployed single mother in her early 20s, Margo is struggling to make ends meet, leading her to launch an OnlyFans account. When her father reenters her life, she starts incorporating his lessons from the pro wrestling world into her OnlyFans work, leading to unexpected success.

item.title: Dutton Ranch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Dutton Ranch.

The Dutton Ranch, home to Beth Dutton and Rip Wheeler, is a testament to the peace they sought, fought for, and nearly died for, as they've come to cherish their 7,000-acre land. With tough times and stiff competition, Beth and Rip do what they must to survive, all while ensuring Carter becomes the man he's supposed to be.

As Beth and Rip fight to build a future together - far from the ghosts of Yellowstone - they collide with brutal new realities and a ruthless rival ranch that will stop at nothing to protect its empire. In South Texas, blood runs deeper, forgiveness is fleeting, and the cost of survival might just be your soul.

item.title: The Testaments
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Testaments.

The Testaments is based on Margaret Atwood's Booker Prize-winning novel of the same name, which was published in 2019 and takes place in the dystopian theocracy of Gilead. Years after the events of The Handmaid's Tale, The Testaments is a coming of age story that finds a new generation of young women in Gilead grappling with the bleak future that awaits them. For these young women, growing up in Gilead is all they have ever known, having no tangible memories of the outside world prior to their indoctrination into this life. Facing the prospect of being married off and living a life of servitude, they will be forced to search for allies, both new and old, to help in their fight for freedom and the life they deserve.

item.title: Memory of a Killer
item.description:

item.description: Sieben praxisnahe KI-Lektionen vom Solo-Entwickler hinter Monologue – über Spracheingabe, zusammengesetzte Skills, die 80/20-Regel und KI-native Workflows.

item.title: Jury Duty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Jury Duty.

Jury Duty chronicles the inner workings of an American jury trial through the eyes of one particular juror, Ronald Gladden. Gladden is unaware the entire case is fake, everyone except him is an actor, including Marsden, and everything that happens — inside the courtroom and out — is carefully planned.

item.title: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord.

Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord picks up after the events of Star Wars: The Clone Wars, for a pulpy adventure that finds Maul plotting to rebuild his criminal syndicate on a planet untouched by the Empire. There, he crosses paths with a disillusioned young Jedi Padawan who may just be the apprentice he is seeking to aid him in his relentless pursuit for revenge.

item.title: The Madison
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Madison.

The Madison is a heartfelt study of grief and human connection following a New York City family in the Madison River valley of central Montana. It is a profound love story channeled through a deeply personal family drama about resilience and transformation. The Madison is unfolding across two distinct worlds - the beautiful landscape of Montana and the vibrant energy of Manhattan - as it examines the ties that bind families together.

item.title: DMV
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: DMV.

DMV is set at the place everyone dreads going most: the DMV. Our quirky and lovable characters are making minimum wage, doing a thankless job where customers are annoyed before they even walk in the door. Good thing they have each other.

item.title: Rooster
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Rooster.

Rooster follows a middle aged author navigating a complicated relationship with his daughter.

item.title: Ludwig
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Ludwig.

Can accidental detective John 'Ludwig' Taylor crack the biggest puzzle of his life - finding his missing brother?

item.title: Welcome to Chippendales
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Welcome to Chippendales.

A sprawling true-crime saga, Welcome to Chippendales tells the outrageous story of Somen "Steve" Banerjee, an Indian immigrant who became the unlikely founder of the world's greatest male-stripping empire - and let nothing stand in his way in the process. The series details the insane, darkly comedic, crime-ridden story behind the unique male revue that became a cultural phenomenon.

item.title: The Beauty
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: The Beauty.

When international supermodels begin dying in gruesome and mysterious ways, two FBI agents are sent to Paris, Venice, Rome and New York to uncover the truth behind these deaths and end up discovering a conspiracy that threatens the future of humanity.

item.title: CIA
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: CIA.

CIA centers on two unlikely partners — a fast-talking, rule-breaking loose cannon CIA case officer, and a by-the-book, seasoned and smart FBI agent who believes in the rule of law. When this odd couple are assigned to work out of CIA's New York Station, they must learn to work together to investigate cases and criminals posing threats on U.S. soil, finding that their differences may actually be their strength.

item.title: Marshals
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Marshals.

Marshals stars Luke Grimes reprising his role as Kayce Dutton. With the Yellowstone Ranch behind him, Dutton joins an elite unit of U.S. Marshals, combining his skills as a cowboy and Navy SEAL to bring range justice to Montana. Kayce and his teammates - Pete Calvin, Belle Skinner, Andrea Cruz and Miles Kittle - must balance the high psychological cost of serving as the last line of defense in the region's war on violence with their duty to their families, which for Kayce includes his son Tate and his confidants Thomas Rainwater and Mo from the Broken Rock reservation.

item.title: Going Dutch
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Going Dutch.

In Going Dutch a decorated, hard-ass colonel is tasked with running the least important U.S. Army base in the world, located in the tulip-hugging, wine-chugging Netherlands.

item.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite.

WarnerMedia announced today that it is partnering with All Elite Wrestling (AEW), the new professional wrestling promotion featuring a world-class roster of diverse male and female wrestlers, giving fans a new wrestling experience for the first time in 20 years. WarnerMedia and AEW together will build this powerhouse sporting league from the ground up and will begin airing weekly matches later this year. With this league, AEW is introducing a new generation of wrestlers to fans, offering fun, gripping and authentic athletic matches that will make wrestling more accessible to a broad audience.

item.title: Heated Rivalry
item.description:
A new show has been added to showRSS: Heated Rivalry.

Two hockey players must decide if there is room in their fiercely competitive world for real love.
